description.text: ZERO-CORNER SLIDERS - POND VIEW - 2.5-CAR GARAGE - TILE THROUGHOUT - Built in 2023 This is the one! Better than new construction! Light-filled Mystique floor plan located in a gated 55+ Del Webb community. Designed for easy Florida living, the open layout features zero-corner sliding glass doors, tray ceilings, and porcelain tile flooring throughout, creating seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The expanded screened lanai overlooks a tranquil pond, offering a private and peaceful setting to relax or entertain. The gourmet kitchen includes quartz countertops, oversized island, wall oven, and abundant cabinetry, all open to the main living and dining areas. The spacious primary suite provides a comfortable retreat, while the 2.5-car tandem garage offers ideal space for a golf cart, storage, or hobbies. Home includes a social membership in Del Webb's active lifestyle community featuring pickleball, tennis, bocce ball, golf simulator, resort pool, lap pool, fitness center, steam room, sauna, billiards, library, and numerous social activities. Optional golf memberships available through Panther Run Golf Club. Situated in the town of Ave Maria, you can bike, walk, or golf cart into town for restaurants, shopping, dining, groceries, and more. As we say: "Ave Maria ~ Once you get here you "get it."

description.text: One or more photo(s) has been virtually staged, AI generated or rendered. PRICED TO SELL! LOWER THAN NEW CONSTRUCTION + A GOLF COURSE & POND VIEW! LOWEST PRICED QUAD HOME AVAILABLE & IMPACT GLASS! Skip the construction noise, upgrade costs, and waiting... this beautifully upgraded Seagrove floor plan is already finished, enhanced, and ready to enjoy - and it comes with one of the most RARE POND & GOLF COURSE VIEWS in Del Webb that the builder is no longer offering. Priced to sell now! Furnishings negotiable. Tucked away on a quiet gated cul-de-sac street with NO active construction nearby, this attached villa offers the lifestyle buyers are searching for without the "add-on" price tags of new builds. IMPACT GLASS, Crown molding, window coverings, upgraded light fixtures, ceiling fans, garage cabinets, epoxy garage floor, utility sink, and attic access are already done - meaning real value from day one. Inside you'll find an open layout with 2 bedrooms + den, 8' doors throughout, and a spacious kitchen featuring 42" cabinetry, quartz countertops, backsplash, and pantry - all designed for easy Florida living. One or more photo(s) has been virtually staged, AI generated or rendered. Enjoy peaceful sunrises over the water and golf course from your East-facing screened lanai, while the screened front porch is perfect for relaxing sunset evenings. Del Webb's vibrant 55+ lifestyle includes pickleball, tennis, bocce, golf simulator, lap pool, resort pool, sauna, steam room, fitness center, library, billiards, and a full social calendar - all just a golf cart ride into the heart of Ave Maria for dining, shopping, and entertainment. description.text: TURNKEY! WATER + GOLF VIEWS! END UNIT CONDO IN DEL WEBB NAPLES. Move right into this beautifully upgraded 2-story condo that lives like a single-family home and shows like a model. Ideally positioned with long lake and golf course views, this light-filled end unit offers privacy, space, and one of the best settings in the community. The open-concept layout features large tile flooring, volume ceilings, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The kitchen is a standout with quartz countertops, white cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and a large island perfect for entertaining. Sliding glass doors open to a screened lanai with panoramic water and golf course views-an ideal backdrop for morning coffee or sunset evenings. Upstairs, generously sized bedrooms provide comfortable space for owners and guests, all offered TURNKEY furnished with stylish coastal decor-ready for immediate enjoyment or seasonal use. Paver driveway, attached garage, and low-maintenance living complete the package. Perfect as a full-time residence, winter retreat, or lock-and-leave lifestyle-this is one of the best values in Del Webb Naples. Del Webb's vibrant 55+ lifestyle includes pickleball, tennis, bocce, golf simulator, lap pool, resort pool, sauna, steam room, fitness center, library, billiards, and a full social calendar - all just a golf cart ride into the heart of Ave Maria for dining, shopping, and entertainment. As we say: "Ave Maria ~ Once you get here you "get it."

description.text: ONE MILE FROM THE BEACH! Location, Location, Location! BEAUTIFUL VIEW from Balcony including sunsets! Everything you love and enjoy about the Naples lifestyle is in this home and close proximity to very Vanderbilt Beach and Mercato! This beautiful 2nd story property is immaculately maintained, offers abundant light as an end unit with high ceilings and no carpet. Over 1500 sq ft of living space with a southern exposure from the lanai. The screened lanai overlooks the pond with fountain and is a perfect relaxing spot to enjoy morning coffee or evening sunsets surrounded by lush tropical landscaping. INCLUDES IMPACT GLASS windows and roll down hurricane shutter for the lanai for easy lock up! You will also enjoy the updated kitchen, plumbing, and wood flooring. Water heater is less than 1 year old. PRICED TO SELL! Living in Pavilion Club means enjoying a well-kept gated community with low HOA fees in an unbeatable location! One assigned covered parking spot, plenty of guest parking and pets welcome! HOA fees include building maintenance, landscaping maintenance, flood insurance, irrigation and drinking water, trash removal, gated entry and on-site manager to list a few. This home is ideal for a full-time residence, seasonal retreat, or investment opportunity. SEASONAL MONTHLY INCOME is in the $6000-$7000+ range. This home offers everything you need to embrace the Naples lifestyle, and just a short drive to Fifth Avenue, Bonita Springs, and RSW airport!

description.text: CORNER LOT | IMPACT GLASS | 4' GARAGE EXTENSION | QUIET CUL-DE-SAC STREETS BETTER THAN NEW CONSTRUCTION! Contour floor plan in Del Webb with no nearby construction and peaceful cul-de-sac streets. Built in 2023, PRICED TO SELL as it is less than new construction quick move in homes listed on sale at $424,990. This light, modern 2 bedroom + den home showcases 21" porcelain TILE THROUGHOUT, quartz countertops, 42" soft-close cabinetry with pull-outs, IMPACT GLASS, and an EXTENDED 4' GARAGE for extra storage or workspace. There is an extra refrigerator/freezer in the garage which stays. Home has all the ceiling fans, light fixtures, and window coverings which are lacking with new construction homes. Impeccably maintained and loaded with upgrades including 8' interior doors, epoxy garage floor, window treatments, ceiling fans, pendant lighting, and an additional refrigerator in the garage. The private corner lot offers extra green space on the side and rear, creating rare openness and privacy. Furniture negotiable. Transferable builder warranty included for remaining covered items. Social membership included. Optional golf available through Panther Run Golf Club. Del Webb is a gated 55+ community offering pickleball, tennis, bocce, lap and resort pools, fitness center, golf simulator, sauna, steam room, billiards, library, and an active social calendar. Situated in town of Ave Maria, you can bike, walk, or golf cart into town for restaurants, shopping, dining, groceries, and more. As we say: "Ave Maria ~ Once you get here, you "get it." TM
